verification.subject: 🏒 Confirm your roster spot at Slapshot Club!
verification.title: Welcome to the team, {username}!
verification.message: The coach has just assigned you a spot on the Slapshot Club roster. Your jersey is already hanging in the locker room, but before you hit the ice, we need to confirm your identity.
verification.footer:
See you in the arena!
SLAPSHOT CLUB • 2026

forgotPassword.subject: 🔑 Lost puck? Reset your password!
forgotPassword.title: Timeout, {username}?
forgotPassword.message: Looks like you lost the puck (or your password) somewhere in the corner of the rink. No worries, we'll get you a quick reset so you can score again in the next shift.
